fields.description: Master switch for the Pine Labs integration.
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: Configure Pine Labs machines with their credentials. Mark exactly one as Is Default.
fields.label: Machines

fields.description: Single Machine: every transaction uses the row marked Is Default. Mapping: consults the Machine Mappings table below by context (user / warehouse / company / POS profile), falling back to Is Default when no mapping matches.
fields.label: Terminal Routing Mode

fields.description: Enable Plural payment-link generation. Required for the 'Send Payment Link' button.
fields.label: Enable Payment Links

fields.description: Provided by Pine Labs during merchant onboarding.
fields.label: Plural Client ID

fields.description: Keep this secret. Never share or expose it on the frontend.
fields.label: Plural Client Secret

fields.description: Used to validate incoming webhook signatures from Pine Labs (x-verify header). Min 16 characters.
fields.label: Webhook Secret (HMAC)

fields.description: Plural API base URL. Sandbox: https://pluraluat.v2.pinepg.in | Production: https://api.pluralpay.in | Local simulator: http://127.0.0.1:5000. Auto-fills with the sandbox URL on save when left blank.
fields.label: Plural API Base URL

fields.description: How long the generated payment link stays valid. Default 1440 minutes (24 hours). Must be > 0.
fields.label: Payment Link Expiry (Minutes)

fields.description: Routing rules used when Terminal Routing Mode is Mapping. Each row says: when context X matches (User / Warehouse / Company / POS Profile), route to machine Y. When more than one row matches, the alphabetically-first machine name wins.
fields.label: Machine Mappings

fields.description: Document types that show the Pine Labs payment buttons. Payment Entry is not allowed here.
fields.label: Payable Doctypes

fields.description: Override Pine Labs API endpoints. Leave empty to use defaults.
fields.label: API Endpoints

fields.description: Auto-cancel pending transactions after this many minutes. Default 3 if 0/empty.
fields.label: Auto Cancel Duration (Minutes)
